title: Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ Injector (90W)
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Pasive PoE / PoE injectors
description: Ubiquiti 10G PoE+++ is a high-quality 10Gbps PoE injector with one PoE output port for powering devices with a voltage of 54V with maximum output power of 90W , which is sufficient for powering energy-intensive devices. Power is conducted on all the wires 1,2,4.5 (+) and 3,6,7.8 (-). The device also includes surge, peak pulse, and overcurrent protection Device Wall mount bracket AC power cord Screws and wall plugs
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000/2500/5000/10000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 100 .. 240V AC Output Power [W] 90 Pin powering 1,2,4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 54 Output Current [A] 1,12
